Chronology of every recorded fact about [[Soulbound]], in reading order. Generated from the same verified fact store as the main article.

== Of Sea and Shadow ==
* {{spoiler|book=ee-sea-01-of-sea-and-shadow|'''Ch 4''' — Greenwardens are supposedly all Soulbound.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-sea-01-of-sea-and-shadow|'''Ch 5''' — Soulbound are humans who borrow the powers of Elders or Kameira.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-sea-01-of-sea-and-shadow|'''Ch 5''' — There were only a handful of Soulbound on the continent.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-sea-01-of-sea-and-shadow|'''Ch 6''' — Soulbound individuals possess powers that can be useful.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-sea-01-of-sea-and-shadow|'''Ch 14''' — It can take years for a Soulbound to bond a Vessel.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-sea-01-of-sea-and-shadow|'''Ch 15''' — Soulbound are created through the process of Awakening.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-sea-01-of-sea-and-shadow|'''Ch 16''' — There are two known Soulbound on the crew.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-sea-01-of-sea-and-shadow|'''Ch 17''' — A Champion is more than just a Soulbound.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-sea-01-of-sea-and-shadow|'''Ch 20''' — A Soulbound has breached Bastion’s Veil.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-sea-01-of-sea-and-shadow|'''Ch 21''' — A Soulbound can wield power freely.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-sea-01-of-sea-and-shadow|'''Ch 21''' — Every Soulbound can feel her Vessel.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-sea-01-of-sea-and-shadow|'''Ch 22''' — Calder wonders if Jerri has become a Soulbound.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-sea-01-of-sea-and-shadow|'''Ch 22''' — Soulbound is a status or type of person.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-sea-01-of-sea-and-shadow|'''Ch 23''' — A Soulbound would not stand a chance against the power of Urzaia's opponent if she focused it.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-sea-01-of-sea-and-shadow|'''Ch 23''' — Naberius Clayborn is a Soulbound.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-sea-01-of-sea-and-shadow|'''Ch 25''' — A Soulbound can fight their way free if they are brought to their Vessel.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-sea-01-of-sea-and-shadow|'''Ch 26''' — Soulbound are the greatest warriors of the Empire.}}

== Of Shadow and Sea ==
* {{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-01-of-shadow-and-sea|'''Ch 2''' — Fletcher compares the envelope to a Soulbound's Vessel.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-01-of-shadow-and-sea|'''Ch 4''' — Soulbound are entities whose relationship to Intent is a subject of concern.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-01-of-shadow-and-sea|'''Ch 4''' — If Naberius Clayborn takes the Heart as his Soulbound Vessel, he would become a Soulbound.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-01-of-shadow-and-sea|'''Ch 6''' — A Soulbound Silent One is a type of entity.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-01-of-shadow-and-sea|'''Ch 6''' — Soulbound are beings that Gardeners avoid fighting at all costs.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-01-of-shadow-and-sea|'''Ch 8''' — Soulbound draw their power from a Vessel.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-01-of-shadow-and-sea|'''Ch 10''' — Each Navigator is a Soulbound, bound to their ship.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-01-of-shadow-and-sea|'''Ch 10''' — Shera's chance of success depends on whether a Soulbound is in the crater.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-01-of-shadow-and-sea|'''Ch 12''' — Bastion was a Soulbound.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-01-of-shadow-and-sea|'''Ch 19''' — A Soulbound is a person who has bonded with an object of power.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-01-of-shadow-and-sea|'''Ch 25''' — Soulbound individuals may have powers granted by their Vessel.}}

== Of Dawn and Darkness ==
* {{spoiler|book=ee-sea-02-of-dawn-and-darkness|'''Ch 1''' — A Soulbound is a type of person Jyrine has dreamed about meeting.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-sea-02-of-dawn-and-darkness|'''Ch 2''' — The Soulbound is a type of entity that flares like a beacon in The Testament's awareness.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-sea-02-of-dawn-and-darkness|'''Ch 4''' — A Soulbound is a person who has something to bind.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-sea-02-of-dawn-and-darkness|'''Ch 5''' — The birth of a Soulbound is a phenomenon of Reading and Intent.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-sea-02-of-dawn-and-darkness|'''Ch 6''' — Soulbound and combat-capable modifications were mobilized because conventional arms are ineffective.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-sea-02-of-dawn-and-darkness|'''Ch 7''' — Soulbound individuals possess powers that are not fully understood.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-sea-02-of-dawn-and-darkness|'''Ch 11''' — A Soulbound can call for their Vessel.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-sea-02-of-dawn-and-darkness|'''Ch 12''' — Shera is a Soulbound.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-sea-02-of-dawn-and-darkness|'''Ch 12''' — Jerri asks what makes Shera more dangerous than any other Soulbound.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-sea-02-of-dawn-and-darkness|'''Ch 13''' — Soulbound is a classification or type of person that Calder asks Duster about.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-sea-02-of-dawn-and-darkness|'''Ch 14''' — A Soulbound was involved in the attack on Mekendi Maxeus.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-sea-02-of-dawn-and-darkness|'''Ch 15''' — A Soulbound is a type of legendary fighter.}}

== Of Darkness and Dawn ==
* {{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-02-of-darkness-and-dawn|'''Ch 1''' — Alagaeus is one of the first Soulbound in the world.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-02-of-darkness-and-dawn|'''Ch 1''' — Soulbound involves a link between an individual and their Vessels.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-02-of-darkness-and-dawn|'''Ch 1''' — A Soulbound is a person who might use a pistol as a Vessel.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-02-of-darkness-and-dawn|'''Ch 4''' — The first few months of a Soulbound are critical when they harness Elder power.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-02-of-darkness-and-dawn|'''Ch 8''' — A Soulbound is a person who has power from an Elder or a Kameira.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-02-of-darkness-and-dawn|'''Ch 10''' — A Soulbound is a person who possesses a Vessel.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-02-of-darkness-and-dawn|'''Ch 11''' — Mortal judges cannot enforce their will on Soulbound with precision or impartiality.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-02-of-darkness-and-dawn|'''Ch 13''' — Soulbound is a group that the Imperial Guard is capable of subduing.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-02-of-darkness-and-dawn|'''Ch 15''' — Jyrine is a Soulbound.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-02-of-darkness-and-dawn|'''Ch 17''' — Shera is a Soulbound without her Vessel.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-02-of-darkness-and-dawn|'''Ch 21''' — A Soulbound can draw power by inhaling through a blade.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-02-of-darkness-and-dawn|'''Ch 22''' — Soulbound are vital to the Empire.}}

== Of Kings and Killers ==
* {{spoiler|book=ee-sea-03-of-kings-and-killers|'''Ch 2''' — A Soulbound is someone Calder cannot defend himself from if Jerri is unarmed.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-sea-03-of-kings-and-killers|'''Ch 4''' — Soulbound individuals are requested to leave their Vessels in secure storage outside the meeting venue.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-sea-03-of-kings-and-killers|'''Ch 5''' — Varia Selethir is Soulbound.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-sea-03-of-kings-and-killers|'''Ch 6''' — Alsa Grayweather would stand no chance in a battle between Soulbound.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-sea-03-of-kings-and-killers|'''Ch 6''' — For a Soulbound, having their Vessel locked away is like having a part of their body go numb.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-sea-03-of-kings-and-killers|'''Ch 6''' — Estyr displays open bloodlust of the ancient Soulbound.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-sea-03-of-kings-and-killers|'''Ch 7''' — Alchemists use leashed Soulbound.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-sea-03-of-kings-and-killers|'''Ch 8''' — Soulbound individuals are capable of raising an island from the sea.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-sea-03-of-kings-and-killers|'''Ch 13''' — Soulbound is a type of magic.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-sea-03-of-kings-and-killers|'''Ch 13''' — A Soulbound was hired to project illusions to lure Bliss away from the Capital.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-sea-03-of-kings-and-killers|'''Ch 14''' — Jerri is maintaining a cover as a Soulbound.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-sea-03-of-kings-and-killers|'''Ch 14''' — Soulbound individuals can control their Vessel through contact.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-sea-03-of-kings-and-killers|'''Ch 17''' — The Luminian Order's support leaves few Soulbound capable of healing injuries.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-sea-03-of-kings-and-killers|'''Ch 17''' — A Soulbound is a power that Luminian Order Pilgrims can possess.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-sea-03-of-kings-and-killers|'''Ch 18''' — Soulbound is a state or achievement one might reach.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-sea-03-of-kings-and-killers|'''Ch 19''' — Champions have requirements regarding the nature of their Soulbound.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-sea-03-of-kings-and-killers|'''Ch 23''' — Soulbound is a power Bliss used to reshape the Spear of Tharlos.}}

== Of Killers and Kings ==
* {{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings|'''Ch 4''' — Soulbound are volatile individuals.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings|'''Ch 8''' — Soulbound unleashed their powers in the streets of the Imperial Palace.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings|'''Ch 14''' — The challenge of a Soulbound is to uncover the layers of Intent and plumb the depths of their Vessel.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings|'''Ch 14''' — A Soulbound once existed with the ability to change appearance and voice.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings|'''Ch 20''' — Powerful Soulbound can destroy the Shades of Urg’naut.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings|'''Ch 22''' — Shera states they need more combat-capable Soulbound.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings|'''Ch 22''' — Soulbound have powers of communication.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings|'''Ch 22''' — Soulbound are entities that can be newly acquired.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings|'''Ch 22''' — Soulbinding is a process where people can come out successfully Soulbound.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings|'''Ch 25''' — Shera has a small army of Soulbound.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings|'''Ch 26''' — Awakened weapons assault the Dead Mother like an army of Soulbound.}}

[[Category:Timelines]]
